name: Intro
commands: My lady, the castle's completely surrounded! We've failed you miserably!{w}
Midir, it's alright. Everyone gave their best. You needn't worry about me anymore.{w}{br}Please save yourself. I want as many of you to get out of this alive as possible!{w}
None of us are going anywhere, my lady. We're here for you till the very end.{w}{br}Even if it means our lives.{w}
Oh... thank you, Midir. I'm so sorry to put you through all this.{w}
Aideen is in trouble. Gandolf's army has laid siege to Jungby Castle.{w}{br}Noish, I'm going to go and see if I can do something. You're in charge while I'm gone.{w}
Sir...{br}You're not planning on going alone, are you!?{w}

Grannvale's military is already en route to Isaac. There really is no one left to call on.{w}{br}Verdane's army may br full of barbarians, but is huge.{w}{br}There are bound to be casualties. I can't get you involved.{w}

Excuse me, sir!? We were born into the knighthood and are prepared to die fighting!{w}{br}We'd be a disgrace to let our master perish out there all alone.{br}We're going with you.{w}{br}Alec, you're with me on this, aren't you?{w}

Damn straight. But we'd better swing by the villages before going to Jungby Castle.{w}{br}Those barbarians will loot the place, kill everybody in sight and then burn it all to the ground.{w}{br}We've got to beat them there and get the villages to strengthen their defenses.{w}
Point well taken, Alec. We mustn't overlook our duty as knights to protect the people.{w}
Actually, Oifaye takes credit for that one. I tell ya, that kid's a strategist in the making.{w}{br}Takes right after that famous grandfather of his, Lord Sesar.{w}
Is Oifaye in the palace now?{br}Oifaye... you here?{w}
Sir, I know I'm not supposed to be here, but I'd like to join your assault.{w}{br}I don't want to just sit back and watch the castle, sir.{w}
I don't know, Oifaye... You're still pretty young. You think you'll be okay out there?{w}
I'm already 14, sir. I know I'm not ready to fight yet, but I can still help out.{w}{br}Please... let me go with you.

Well, it has been a good two years since you began training for your knighthood under me.{w}{br}You're probably ready for some battlefield action. But no fighting...{br} not just yet anyway.{w}{br}Why don't you come along as my personal advisor?{w}
Sir, have you considered leaving someone behind to defend the castle?{w}{br}It would be too risky not to. We would be finished if we lost our base here to the enemy.{w}
Hey Noish... you KNOW who'd be perfect for that job!{br}Isn't that right, Arden?{w}
Because you're strong, reliable... and slow!{br}You're the one, hands down! Hahahaa!{w}
Hrmph. I can live with the strong and reliable part, but leave the slow bit out of it, ok?{w}
Arden, can we count on you? You're the only who aptly handle the castle's defenses.{w}
Alright, I'll do it. But you gotta promise to take me to battle with you sometimes.{w}
Will do. Alright, let's make our way to the villages, and the we're off to Jungby!{w}

name: Narration
commands: At the heart of the continent of Jugdral lies Grannvale,{w} a kingdom founded by Saint Heim{br}of the Twelve Crusaders.{w}{br}Supporting the royal family, the heirs of Heim, are six noble houses,{w} each also descended{br}from a Crusader of old.{w}{br}The six states, while still subservient to royal family,{w} each occupy vast swaths of{w}{br}Grannvale's land and maintain mighty militaries of their own.{w}
Owing to King Azmur's advanced age, the governance of Grannvale falls to his son,{w}
the highly respected Prince Kurth.{w}{br}Kurth has two trusted advisors in his rule:{w}
and Lord Ring of House Jungby.{w}
Grannvale's chancellor, Lord Reptor{br}of Friege,{w}{br}has long objected to the threat to his{br}influence posed by Kurth and his advisors,{w}
and has allied himself with the avaricious Lord Langbalt of House Dozel to form a faction{w}{br}opposed to Kurth's rule over Grannvale.{w}
The young duke of House Velthomer,{br}Lord Arvis, leads the Royal Guard in the{w}{br}king's care and so has little time for the{br}circus of politics.{w}
Only Father Claude of House Edda, could foresee the oncoming storm.{w}
Into the midst of this tense situation, comes dire news from Jugdral's east.{w}
Darna, a town in the Yied Desert with deep ties to Grannvale,{w} is now besieged by savage warriors from Isaac.{w}{br}Reports of a brutal massacre abound.{w}
The news are met by the people of Grannvale with furious cries for retribution,{w} and before long the kingdom declares war on Isaac.{w}
Prince Kurth leads Grannvale's charge on his father's behalf,{w} commanding the military might of the kingdom's six houses.{w}
At Kurth's side as always is none other than Lord Byron,{w} a highly decorated hero of peerless valor in his own right.{w}
Grannvale has pured its entire military might into the Isaac campaign,{w} a precious few soldiers remain behind. With its neighbours -{w}
and Verdane to the south -{br}bound in alliance with Grannvale,{w}{br}none dare to dream they could ever be threatened.{w}
It's not long at all, however, before the people's confidence is shattered.{w}
As if from nowhere, a vast horde from Verdane led by Prince Gandolf{w} crosses the Grannvale border and lays siege to Jungby Castle.{w}
In Lord Ring's absence, his daugther, Lady Aideen, is Jumgby's onlt guardian.{w}{br}Lord Byron has entrusted the defense of Grannvale in his absence to his son,{w}

Sigurd, who remains at Chalphy Castle with a mere handful of soldiers.{w}{br}A friend of Aideen since childhood,{w} Sigurd is horrified to hear of the Jungby siege,{w} and even with so few soldiers, is determined to protect Aideen and his fatherland from the savage Verdanite hordes.{w}
The year is 757, Grann calendar.{br}And thus the threshold of fate is cast open.{w}{br}Noone could have then known that this simple disturbance{w}
was but the first of countless calamities to come.{w}

name: Aideen's Kidnap
commands: What's takin' you morons so long to take this dinky castle? Never mind, I'll do it meself!{w}
# Gandolf attacks Midir. He crits Midir.
Ya held our pretty well for bein' on yer own.{w}{br}But I've gotcha now.{br}Die!{w}
Oooh! Who have we here...? Lady Aideen of Jungby! Heh heh... You're comin' with me!{w}
DiMaggio, you and Gerrard are in charge.{w}
Don't ya worry. I'll be back with Kinbois and his men.{w}{br}Hell, we may even press on to Belhalla. There'd be no one to stop us if we did!{w}{br}Make yourselves at home here, boys. Anything goes!
Heh... you can count on us for that.{w}
Hey, you're draggin'!{br}Now pick up the pace!!{w}
Take out this bridge! I don't want any of them Grannvaleians gettin' oven here!{w}
Gerrard, I'm headin' back to Marpha Castle. The castle's in your hands, so stay alert!{w}
Yes sir! Who's the dame, Your Highness?{w}
She's my booty! I'm takin' her back to be my wife. She's a keeper, wouldn't ya say?{w}
Yeah, she's makin' my mouth water.{w}
You wipe that grin off your face!{br}You'll get your needs met once Grannvale is ours.{w}
Show a little self-control till then.{w}
You're all animals... Dear Lord, please instill these people with a little decency.{w}
What're you mumblin' about!? We're goin'! No fallin' behind this time!{w}
Get movin', idiots! We're goin' to Chalphy. Bring any loot you find in the villages to me!{w}

name: CWVillage
commands: Here - the whole village did their bit to raise some money for you.{w}{br}It's not much, but we hope it helps out there.{w}{br}Be sure to lend the other villages a hand, too.{br}I bet they'll be happy to help you out right back{w}

name: CEVillage
commands: The master archers of House Jungby all bear descent from the archery crusader, Ulir.{w}{br}Our noble duke, Lord Ring, has twin daughters as well as a younger son.{w}{br}Alas, the duke lost one of the girls to pirates, years and years ago...{br}She was just a little lass...{w}{br}Lady Aideen's still here, but the son Lord André is away with his lord father on the Isaac campaign.{w}{br}Rumor has it, though, that the two aren't getting along well now that the boy's grown...{w}

name: NWVillage
commands: The lords of this land, House Chalphy, have been revered as the most magnificent swordsmen for generations.{w}{br}It's no wonder, being that they bear the bloodline of Baldr, the crusader of light of old.{w}{br}Those Verdane thugs are lucky Lord Byron isn't arounf with his holy sword, Tyrfing.{br}They wouldn't stand a chance!{w}

name: NEVillage
commands: Pay attention, kid! Weapons aren't created equal.{w} See, swords best axes, axes best lances, and lances best swords.{w}{br}This right here's why you've gotta use your{br}head before you blunder into battle.{w}{br}Speaking of battle, if you ever find yourself{br}hurting out there...{w} a fort is the best place to go.{w} It ain't free, mind. Every bit of health you regain there will cost five gold pieces.{w}{br}But you can't put a price on your health.

name: SVillage
commands: Oh? You came to save us?{br}I was so sure this was the end!{w}{br}Take this little trinket. It's the least I can do.{w}{br}They call it a "speed ring".{br}Slip this magic band on and you'll be as nimble as a feather!{w}{br}Go on, try it out!{br}Your enemies will be too slow to hit you!{w}

name: TownTutorial
commands: Sire, might I recommend stopping by the castle town once you're rested?{w}{br}To see you unharmed should help calm and reassure your citizens.{w}
Oh hey, can you tell Lord Sigurd to come around when he has some time?{w}{br} To see him unharmed should help calm and reassure the citizens.{w}

I've got to say that the Castle-Town System from FE4 is not available right now,{w} but you can access the respective Shops and Arenas from Chapters 1 to 10{w} in the Preparation-Base before the battle starts.{w}{br}Also there, you'll have the option to repair every unit's equipment for a certain amount of gold.{w}{br}Make sure you use it, there is no other way to repair them.{w}

name: Chronology
commands: The Kingdom of Grann is born on the Jun River's west banks.
Republic's territory expands. A golden age of prosperity begins.
Advent of the dark god -its vessel- Galle founds the Loptyrian Order.
Rise of the dark god's Deadlords.,The Grann Republic falls.
Archibishop Galle is crowned the first ruler of the Loptyr Empire.
The Sorrow of Miletos. Children, are burned alive in droves as sacrifices to the dark god.
The Edda Massacre.,Over 10.000 victims of the Empire.
The Miracle of Darna.,The gods bestow their power upon twelve rebels.,The Twelve Crusaders.
Downfall of the Loptyr Empire.,Seven Crusaders unite to start a powerful new state.,The other five form independent kingdoms.
The Kingdom of Grannvale is born.
Grannvale declares war on the eastern nation of Isaac.

name: JungbySeize
commands: Sire, there's a young knight collapsed over there!{w}
Oh?... That's Midir!{br}Midir, hold on!{w}{br}What happened here?{w}
Gandolf... That's all I need to hear.{br}Midir, I'll do all I can to rescue her.{w}{br}You stay here and rest up.{w}
I can't, sir. I've got to help!{br}I can't stand staying here, knowing those thugs still have her!{w}

name: GenoaSeize
commands: Sire, we've found this young boy in the dungeon.{w}
What's the matter? Why are you silent? I want to know why you were held here.{w}
You're not one of Kinbois' lot... Are you?{w}
We've dealt with Kinbois.{br}There's nothing to be afraid of anymore.{w}
Oh! So Ayra doesn't have to keep fighting!{w}{br}My Auntie Ayra was forced to fight 'cause Kinbois had me!{w}{br}Please! You've got to help her!{w}
That swordswoman? Huh. I thought there was something amiss about her...{w}{br}Very well!{w}{br}I'll let her know that you're safe. Now, what's your name?{w}
Shannan.{br}...I'm Shannan, the prince of Isaach...{w}

Isaach's prince, you say...{w}{br}I can barely begin to imagine what you've been through, Shannan.{w}{br}For now, though, you're welcome to stay with our army.{w}{br}Don't worry. One day, you'll make it home.{w}{br} I'll do all I can to ensure that.{w}
I-I'm Shannan... Prince Shannan of Isaach...{w}{br}You're not one of Kinbois' lot... Are you?{w}
Isaach's prince?! ...Er, forgive me.{br}I am Sigurd, a paladin of Grannvale.{w}{br}We've defeated Prince Kinbois. You're safe now.{w}
Really?! Then Ayra doesn't have to fight anymore!{w}{br}My Auntie Ayra was forced to fight 'cause Kinbois had me!{w}{br}Come on, we've gotta tell her!{w}
Ayra? That swordswoman out there? ...Oh. Oh no...{w}
It... It can't be... She's dead?... You killed Auntie Ayra?!{w}
I'm so sorry, Shannan... If I had known, I would've done all I could to help her...{w}
Oifaye, could you take care of Shannan for a while?{w}{br}Try to help him calm down a bit.{w}
Pardon me, sire, but we're currently at war with Isaach.{w}{br}If we're going to harbor its prince, shouldn't we inform the king?{w}
He's a child, Oifaye. That war has nothing to do with him.{w}{br}I'll find a way to get him home safely, but for now, we need to look after him.{w}
Just as I thought...{br}Lord Sigurd really is such a kind man...{w}

name: MarphaSeize
commands: N-no! Please, let go of me!{w}
Heh heh... What's the matter?{br}C'mon, I'm just askin' for a little date.{w}
I need to go home, sir.{br}I ask you, please, pay me no mind!{w}
Shaddup!{br}Keep up your yappin' and you'll regret it!{w}
What's going on here?{br}Let the girl go.{w}
What's your problem!? This one's-{w}{br}...Urgh! You're not that Grannvale paladin, are you?{w}
You understand the situation?{br}Then be on your way.{w}{br}There are none I loathe more than your kind.{w}{br}The girl has given you her answer.{br}Now, leave her be and get out of my sight!{w}
Yeah... Yeah, got it...{br}My bad, missy.{w}{br}I was just teasin', is all.{br}Sorry. I'll be off now...{w}
Yes. I met a woman named Aideen not long ago{br}in this castle, and...{w}
She did.{w}{br}I knew from the moment I laid eyes on you:{br}You are in every way the man I had imagined...{w}
May I... ask for your name?{w}
...I'm sorry, but... I... I must go.{w}
Wait!{br}Please, I just want to talk for a little longer--{w}
...I am truly sorry.{br}I am glad we could meet, even once...{w}
What? What do you mean?{br}Please, wait!{w}
Lord Sigurd, is it?{br}What's the matter?{w}
Oh... You must be the town elder!{w}{br}That woman who ran off just now...{br}Do you know who she is?{w}
Ahh, of course. That woman is called Deirdre.{br}She is a priestess of the spirit forest.{w}
Ohoho, even a refined man like you can't resist{br}being charmed by her ilk!{w}{br}Could it be love at first sight? Hoho...{w}
Sir, please. Don't tease me. And yet...{br}I've never seen anybody so beautiful before.{w}{br}I... I need to see her again.{w}

Alas, sir, for it cannot be so.{w}{br}The folk of the spirit forest stauchly refuse to{br}partake in the world beyond their woods.{w}{br}Furthermore, that girl and members of her clan{br}are forbidden form ever liasing with men.{w}{br}Village lore dictates that should this ever happen,{br}calamity would befall the world.{w}{br}You have no choice, sir.{br}Resign yourself of that girl.{w}
What superstitious nonsense!{br}That poor girl... Deirdre... we must meet again.{w}

Father, this is absurd!{br}Why do you still refuse to listen to me?{w}{br}My brothers already have fallen,{w}{br}and it's only a matter of time before{br}they come for the capital as well.{w}{br}The Grannvale commander, Sir Sigurd,{br}is a good man.{w}{br}Please, end the war while you still can!{w}
I... allowed Gandolf's raid only because I'd been{br}told that Grannvale would surely come to invade{br}us first.{w}{br}Never did I intend for a war like this.{w}
It was that sorcerer, Sandima, who told you{br}that, wasn't it?{w}{br}You, Kinbois, and Gandolf trusted him too{br}readily. You've all been deceived!{w}
Now, now, Prince Jamke.{br}That's enough of that.{w}{br}Your duty as prince is to lead your men into{br}the fray. Dawdling in a place like this would{w}{br}be deeply troublesome of you.{w}
That's enough, Jamke. Listen to Sandima.{br}Go. Lead your men into the fray.{w}

Father!... Very well.{w}{br}If you won't change your mind, even now,{br}then... I'll see this through as well.{w}{br}But be warned.{w}{br}Should I return victorious, Sandima, and{br}I'll allow you to live no longer!{w}
Sandima...{w}{br}Perhaps, for all this time, you may not have{br}been entirely forthright with me.{w}{br}You did assure me that Grannvale hungers to{br}claim our land, and yet...{w}

Feh... And just what are you saying now?{w}{br}To think, I believed that you Verdanites would be{br}of use... You truly are naught but savages.{w}{br}You are worthless.{br}Completely and utterly worthless!{w}{br}And from now on, your army is mine to command!{w}
So, you've put an end to the king, Sandima...{w}{br}Do you expect that the Verdanite army will still{br} obey you command?{w}
Oh, Archbishop Manfroy!{w}{br}How long have you been here, Your Eminence?{br}The army is of no concern at all.{w}{br}They only need to know that the king has fallen ill.{w}
Hrm, I see... And what of the situation here?{br}Does the plan progress?{w}
My sincerest apologies, Your Excellency.{w}{br}That Grannvalian... Sigurd, or something, has{br}proven to be an unexpected obstacle to the invasion.{w}
Hm... And what of the search for the Loptyrian{br}scion? Have you found Cigyun's daughter?{w}

Imbecile! After all of the pains I have gone to,{br}to locate the boy...{w}{br}The son of Cigyun is still in Belhalla,{br}but he's worthless without the female.{w}{br}Listen well. Cigyun was an heir of Prince Maira,{br}brother of an emperor of the old Loptyr Empire.{w}{br}Cigyun alone in this era inherited the sacred blood{br}of the dark lord.{w}{br}That woman broke the commandment that Maira{br}placed upon his heirs and bore two children.{w}{br}Do you know what this means?{w}
Yes, Your Eminence.{w}{br}When the blood of the two heirs intersects, the{br}second coming of the dark lord, Loptyr,{br}will be upon us.{w}

Precisely, and so too shall we, descendants of{br}the Loptyr Empire, return to this world.{w}{br}You know as well as I, Sandima, how heavily{br}our fates depend upon the resurrection of the dark lord.{w}{br}You know well our order's centuries of exile,{br}hidden deep within the Yied Desert.{w}{br}You know well the abuses... The famines...{w}{br}How we were sustained only by dreaming{br}of the day when the Empire will rise again.{w}{br}And at long last, that day is upon us.{w}
Understood, Your Eminence.{w}{br}If I must surrender my life to ensure that{br}the plan is realized, I will do it gladly!{w}

name: EvansSpawn
commands: DiMaggio blew it!? That worthless piece of crap! Prince Gandolf won't be pleased.{w}{br}Damn it all! Go put th' bridge back up over Jun River. Let's get it right this time!{w}
His Majesty wants me to check on things... The savages sure aren't going down easy.{w}{br}Sheesh...{br}Sigurd, you don't impress me much.{w}

name: FightDiMaggio
commands: So ya made it here, ya Grannvaleian cowards...{w}{br}I, Lord DiMaggio, will finish you

name: FightKinbois
commands: Pointing your little stick at me?{w}{br}That's precious, that is!{w}{br}I'll cave your head right in!{w}

name: FightJamke
commands: I don't want to hurt you!{br}Begone from this land at once!

name: FightAyra
commands: You stand between me and Shannan's future...{w}{br}Farewell!{w}

name: FightElliot
commands: Gah... Grannvale!{w}{br}Don't interfere with this,{w}{br}unless you want me to wipe the floor with you too!{w}

name: FightChagall1
commands: Gah... Grannvale!{w}{br}Don't interfere with this,{w}{br}unless you want me to wipe the floor with you too!{w}

name: FightPhillip
commands: Warriors of Grannvale...{w}{br}So long as I draw breath,{br}you shall never reach Heirhein!{w}

name: FightBoldor
commands: Grannvale's here already!?{w}{br}Blast... Why couldn't my men have been useful for once?{w}{br}Fine, I'll take this into my own hands!{w}

name: FightMacbeth
commands: Grannvale's here? It can't be...{w}{br}What do those mercenaries think I'm paying them for!?{w}{br}Ooh... It looks like I'll have to settle this myself!!{w}

name: FightVoltz
commands: You seem like decent folk,{br}but a job's a job. Too bad.{w}

name: FightBeowulf
commands: Don't hold this against me... it's just how I make a living.!{w}

name: FightClement
commands: You invaders!! …since it’s come to this, I’ll fight you!{w}

name: FightZain
commands: Damned Grannvaleians… This is a matter of my pride as a warrior! I’ll finish this and wipe you all out!{w}

name: FightErinys
commands: Knights of Grannvale, return Prince Lewyn to us!!{w}

name: FightGandolf
commands: So ya made it here, ya Grannvaleian cowards...{w}{br}I, Lord Gandolf, will finish you

name: FightSandima
commands: Kehehehehe... Allow me to teach you first-hand the horror of dark magic!

name: FightGerrardMidir
commands: Shut up! Where's Lady Aideen!? Bring her back, now!!{w}

name: FightGandolfMidir
commands: You're that knight from earlier!?{w}{br}Ugh, I don't believe this...{w}{br}What are you doing still alive?{w}
Prepare yourself, Gandolf!{br}I'll never forgive you!{w}

name: FightGandolfAzel
commands: And what are you supposed to be?{w}{br}You've got nerve, brat!{w}
So you're Gandolf...{br}How dare you harm Aideen!{w}

name: FightSandimaJamke
commands: You're too late, Jamke.{br}Your father has already passed on.{w}

name: FightSandimaDeirdre
commands: What's this?{br}A priestess, are you?{w}{br}Could it be... Might you be Deirdre...?{br}The cursed maiden...

name: FightElliotLachesis
commands: Princess Lachesis...{w}{br}This has gone far enough.{br}If you'll become my wife, I'll spare you.{w}
You filthy...! Become your wife!?{br}I'd rather die!!{w}

name: FightChagallErinys
commands: Mwahaha, it’s you... Finally realized the truth, did you? You stupid woman.{w}
Chagall! You lied to me… I cannot forgive you! Prepare yourself!{w}

name: FightChagallLachesis
commands: Hey, aren’t you Eldigan’s sister? How dare you rise up against me!{w}
You’re not MY king! Return my brother to me this instant!{w}

name: FightMacbethLewyn
commands: You're Macbeth? You're not qualified to be lord. It's about time you were... retired...{w}

name: FightVoltzBeowulf
commands: Heh... Beowulf.{br}You ain't even close to a match fer me yet.{w}
Oh, definitely...{br}But this is what they're payin' me for.{w}

name: DeathGerrard
commands: Too bad for you... {br}That dame of yours ain't here.{w}{br}Prince Gandolf's got her.

name: DeathElliot
commands: Gah! Blast... Why must...{br}everything... go Eldigan's

name: DeathZain
commands: Guh… Is the end of Augustria…?

name: DeathVoltz
commands: Th-this can't be... You got me...

name: LA
commands: Lex, looks like we made it in time.{w}
Geez... Looks like Sigurd is taking on the entire Verdane Army!{w}{br}He'll sure be happy to see us. You just can't stay out of these things, can you, Azel...?{w}

Yeah, but with the military on engagement to Isaac, Grannvale's completely strapped!{w}{br}Sigurd and the few soldiers left in Chalphy are out there fighting for their lives!{w}{br}I can't just leave them hanging...{w}
Oh really... I'm not quite buying your story, Azel. What aren't you telling me?{w}
I'd surmise that you're all worked up about Lady Aideen of Jungby. I know you like her.{w}
A-ha! Face is getting red there, buddy! You little player you.{w}
Lex, knock it off!{br}Now come on, lets get going.{w}
Hahahaa... Alright, let's do this. Finally, a chance to kick some ass.

name: QFE
commands: Looks like we're not too late. I hope Sigurd is alright.{w}

I'm sure my brother's fine, but he has no one around him that can use magic.{w}{br}I'm sure I can put my Live Staff to some use around here.{w}{br}I'm sorry to pull you into this, Quan.{w}{br}I know I'm no longer a Chalphy, but I can't just sit back and do nothing.{w}{br}On my brother's behalf, thank you so much for coming.{w}
You don't need to thank me, Ethlyn. You know Sigurd and I go way back.{w}{br}Not to mention that he's my brother-in-law now. Besides, I can't have you fighting alone.{w}
Forgive me for interrupting, but we should hurry. The battle is just up ahead.

name: LexSigurdTalk
commands: It's been a while, huh, Lord Sigurd?{w}
Lex!{br}I take it you're here to help as well?{w}
Yeah, Azel dragged me into it.{br}I swear, I can't say 'No' to that twerp!{w}
Hahaha...{br}You haven't changed a bit, have you, Lex?{w}{br}But what about your father, Lord Langbalt?{br}Does he know you've come here?{w}

Oh, hell no!{br}You know as well as I how much my father loathes yours.{w}{br}There's no way he'd ever let me help House Chalphy, even if his life depended on it.{w}{br}I had to slip out behind his back.{w}{br}Just so we're clear, Sigurd, I'm not here for you.{br}Azel's my best friend, and he really wanted to help. That's all.{w}
Heh. A bit harsh, but thanks for coming all the same.{br}Any help is greatly appreciated.{w}
Well, I'll do what I can.{br}Those Verdane dogs have had their run of our land for long enough!{w}

name: AzelAideenTalk
commands: Ah, Lady Aideen! You're safe... Thank the gods...{w}
Lord Azel?{br}Have you been fighting for Jungby as well?{w}
When the news of your abduction reached us,{br}the thought of you in danger while I just sat{w}{br}at home was unbearable!{w}{br}I came to Jungby as quickly as I could.{w}
Hold on. You are the younger brother{br}of Lord Arvis of Velthomer, are you not?{w}{br}Did he allow you to come?{w}
No, I... I came without his consent.{w}{br}And he certainly won't be pleased.{w}
Why would you do something so reckless, then?{w}{br}I thought you abhorred violence.{w}

name: MidirAideenTalk
commands: Milady? You... You're safe!{br}Ahh... Thank the gods!{w}{br}I'm so sorry I failed to protect you.{br}Please, forgive me...{w}

The important part is that you're safe as well, Midir.{br}Please, don't worry about it.{w}{br}You gave your all to protect me,{br}and I couldn't thank you enough for that,{br}even if you didn't succeed.{w}{br}For now I'd like you to remain with Sigurd.{br}He could use your strength.{w}
Certainly, milady.{w}{br}He's done so much for me, for you,{br}and for all of Jungby.{w}{br}I'll do all I can to return his kindness.{w}

name: DewAideenTalk
commands: Hey! Miss Aideen!{br}I got something good to give you.{w}{br}look, I picked up this odd cane.{w}{br}It won't do much good if I just hold on to it, will it?{w}
Oh? This is a Warp staff.{w}{br}Where did you find it, Dew?.{w}
Oh...er...I...{w}{br}I found it just over there!{br}Yeah! That's right. Weird, isn't it?{w}{br}I betcha one of the gods left it over there.{w}{br}Juuuuust for you!{w}
Oh, Dew... Having a staff like this{br}ought to be a great help for everybody.{w}{br}Thank you. I'll cherish it.{w}

name: NordionGuardTalk
commands: Rest assured, Nordion has this region covered.{w}{br}Leave this point to us.{w}

name: BeowulfRecruit
commands: Hey, you! Wanna hire my blade?{br}20.000 gold. Take it or leave it.{w}
...Right, deal. You ain't gonna be disappointed.{w}
What's that? Don't have it? Hit the road!{w}
Why? To expensive for ya? Then hit the road!{w}

name: SigurdAideenTalk
commands: Lord Sigurd! So you came to my aid, did you?{w}{br}Please accept my apologies. I've put the people{br}of Chalphy through nothing but danger...{w}
Don't worry about it.{br}Everyone will be glad to know that you're safe.{w}{br}You've nothing to worry about anymore.{w}{br}The road back to Jungby is secure for you, when you're ready.{w}
No, I wish to remain here.{br}Injuries are inevitable in war.{w}{br}As a humble servant to the gods, it is my duty{br}to stay here and aid your wounded.{w}

Say, Aideen... As I recall, you declined to pursue{br}a knighthood and instead joined the clergy. Am I right?{w}I shouldn't be surprised, knowing how easily{br}people warm to you, and you them.{w}{br}I'd do well to learn from your example!{w}
Thank you, Lord Sigurd, but that isn't entirely true{w}{br}Initially, I sought priesthood in a bid to help me{br}find my sister.{w}{br}Even now, I still believe this is the answer I seek.{w}
You mean Bridget...{br}I'd heard that she went missing as a child.{w}{br}So all this time, Aideen, you've been{br}praying for her sake, haven't you?{w}
Yes. I know we'll meet someday.{w}{br}No matter what happens, I mush give her this:{br}her sacred birthright, the bow Yewfelle!{w}

name: QuanAyraTalk
commands: Princess Ayra of Isaach, I presume?{br}I heard your story from Sigurd.{w}{br}I'm Quan of Lenster{w}

I'd hate to press you for information so soon,{br}but there's something I'd like to know.{w}{br}Why did Isaach attack Darna in the first place?{w}{br}Surely you knew doing so would invoke the wrath of Grannvale.{w}{br}That King Mananan would commit such a{br}reckless act... The very idea defies belief.{w}
You knew my father, Sir Quan!?{w}

I'm afraid I never had the chance to meet him.{br}However, my father knows him well.{w}{br}He's always had only the utmost praise for him.{w}{br}He also speaks fondly of your brother,{br}Prince Mariccle.{w}{br}He's always said he's a fine young man{w}

Is that so? It heartens me to hear it.{w}{br}Without any doubt, my father and Mariccle were{br}admirable men. Never would they condone{w}{br}such an assault on a defenseless city.{w}{br}In the matter of Darna, the patriarch of Rivough{br}acted alone and without our consent...{w}
I beg your pardon!?{br}Why haven't the Grannvalians heard this?{w}{br}Surely if Prince Kurth knew the truth,{br}he would refuse to continue the war.{w}
So, too, thought my father.{w}{br}Once he executed the Rivough patriarch,{w}{br}he departed for the Grannvale front, head in tow,{br} to negotiate with them.{w}{br}But...{w}

My father, the king...{br}He was assassinated on the way.{w}{br}Once word of this returned to Isaach,{br}the people were utterly incensed.{w}{br}Mariccle set out, leading our entire army,{br}seeking vengeance against Grannvale.{w}
Something is amiss here.{br}The murder of a king who seeks peace talks,{br}certainly isn't like Prince Kurth, either.{w}{br}Have you told Sigurd of this as well?{w}
No. Lord Sigurd carries enough of a burden{br}as it is. It's too late for my brother...{w}
Prince Mariccle was resigned to his death{br}when he engaged Grannvale, wasn't he...?{w}
My brother believed to the last that Isaach's hope{br}for the future rests in Shannan, his son.{w}{br}My role is to protect Shannan, and with him, the promise of Isaach's liberty...{w}
I see. Thank you for telling me, Princess Ayra.{w}{br}Someday, the world will know this truth,{br}and till that day comes, you mustn't give in.{w}{br}I will do all I can to help you.{w}

name: QuanFinnTalk
commands: Finn, this will likely be a very long battle.{w}{br}My apologies for bringing you into it.{w}
I am but your humble servant, milord.{w}{br}I would go anywhere, should my master will it.{w}
Even so, I am but a page...{w}{br}It honors me to have your confidence, but I doubt I'll be of much use to you.{w}
Is that so?{w}{br}In that case, what better time than now is there for a spot of hands-on training?{w}{br}Draw, Finn!{w}

name: JamkeRecruitment
commands: Aideen!? What are you doing here?{w}
You said you would persuade your father, yet{br}instead you've taken to the field yourself.{w}{br}What is the matter with you?{w}
My father is a changed man.{br}My words can no longer reach him...{w}{br}...It all started when that sorcerer, Sandima, arrived.{w}{br}My entire family now obeys his every word.{w}

That is why I ask...{br}Why have you taken to the field?{w}{br}Please, Jamke.{w}{br}Join us. Let's go to Verdane together.{w}{br}We can reason with the king, one more time.{br}We can put an end to this war!{w}{br}Lord Sigurd has no interest in invading{br}Verdane. He fought only to rescue me.{w}{br}Please listen, Jamke. Please... I beg of you.{w}
Fine... If you're willing to go so far,{br}then I'll stain my name with treason{w}{br}But it must be understood that I won't{br}let anyone lay a finger on my father.{w}
Yes, I will promise you that.{w}{br}Thank you, Jamke.{br}You truly are a good person.{w}

name: AideenEthlynTalk
commands: Aideen, are you okay?{br}When I heard you'd been abducted, I was so worried!{w}

You came to fight for me as well, Ethlyn?{br}Thank you... I'm sorry for your trouble.{w}{br}It's difficult to convey my thanks,{br}but please, accept this staff.{w}{br}I think you'll have more use for it than me.{w}
Is this... a Return staff!?{br}Oh, thank you, Aideen!{w}{br}I'll put it to good use to help us all.{w}

Ok, I have to warn you all, Return and Rewarp staves are already here (+1 point for the new LT),{w} the thing is that Return has global range and can't yet target to specific tiles (I'm working on it),{w} so you'll be able to teleport anywhere, that's why it will only have 2 uses...{w} until I realize how to do it target only certain tiles of the map.{w}

name: AzelSigurdTalk
commands: Lord Sigurd!{br}I'm so relieved to see you're unharmed.{w}
Azel? Azel of Velthomer?{br}What are you doing here?{w}
I'm here with Lex.{br}We want to do whatever we can to fight the Verdanite invasion.{w}{br}Please, allow us to fight by your side.{br}We won't let you down!{w}
Of course! I couldn't ask for better help.{br}But what of your brother, Lord Arvis?{w}{br}Is he alright with you helping out?{w}
No... He's been tasked with command of the Royal Guard.{w}{br}He made it clear that I wasn't supposed to leave Belhalla at all{w}
Did he, now? I can only imagine the scolding that you'll be in for later!{w}
I know this is a dreadful thing to say, but to be honest, I'm terrified of Arvis...{w}{br}Sometimes, when I'm around him, I...{br}I feel as if I'm only a nuisance to him.{w}
Is that right...?{br}Well, whatever your reasons, I'm just glad that you're here, Azel.{w}{br}You're more that welcome to stay for as long as you want.{w}
Wow, he's just like all the rumors say!{br}He's nothing like Arvis...{w}

name: QuanSigurdTalk
commands: Sigurd!{br}Glad to see you in one piece.{w}
We heard about the Verdane attack and couldn't just leave you be.{br}We're here to do what we can.{w}
But what about Lenster?{br}Aren't your hands full there, keeping an eye on Thracia?{w}
Indeed.{br}That's why Finn is the only knight here with me.{w}{br}The Lance Knights are all back at home, under Father's command.{w}
Is that so...{br}Quan, I'm sorry for pulling you into this mess, too. I know you're-{w}
Sorry?{br}Surely you jest, Sigurd!{w}{br}Don't you recall our old pledge?{w}

Come now!{br}How could you forget?{w}{br}All those years ago, when we were students at the Belhalla academy?{w}{br}You, me, and Eldigan.{br}Dear friends and fierce rivals in equal measure?{w}{br}Surely you recall that night, talking late about our hopes and dreams, and pledging our aid to one another in times of need?{w}
Ah, of course!{br}I remember it well.{w}

Excellent. Now, shall we?{br}With both of us here, what hope could those Verdanite savages possible have?{w}{br}Never forget, Sigurd.{br}I'm here for you, now and forever.{w}{br}I'll not let you lose to these lowlives!{w}

name: EthlynSigurdTalk
commands: It's great to see you, too, Ethlyn.{br}Thanks so much for coming.{w}
I just couldn't stay away when I heard of Verdane's attacks...{w}{br}It's such a relief to know you're okay.{w}
Oh, come now.{br}Did you really think I was about to lose to Verdane?{w}

I'd heard that Chalphy barely has any soldiers left behind, given that most of the army is away in Isaac.{w}{br}And let's face it, I can't remember the last time you didn't just leap straight into a crisis without thinking.{w}{br}With Father away at war... I knew I had to come. Someone has to save you from yourself, after all.{w}

Heh heh.{br}Wow, it feels as if I was getting this very lecture only yesterday!{w}{br}I swear, after Mother passed away, it was you who single-handedly kept us in check.{w}{br}Once you went off to marry Quan, we could've sworn that Father finally had a proper little lady for a daughter...{w}{br}But no, nothing's changed after all!{br}I feel so sorry for Quan... Ahahahaha!{w}
Sigurd, I'm only what you and Father made me!{br} If I'm a fusspot, then it's squarely your fault!{w}{br}Perhaps if the two of you hadn't been so unkempt...{w}{br}

Heh, perhaps you're right.{br}Listen, Ethlyn...{w}{br}We might not act like it, but everything you've done means the world to us.{w}{br}I'm so sorry for all the trouble I've always caused you... And thank you so much for coming.{w}

name: SigurdArvisTalk
commands: It has been too long, Master Sigurd.{w}
His Majesty is concerned with the crisis here, and he bade me to come and observe.{w}{br}He also entrusted me with this -{br}a gift for you.{w}
This is... a silver sword!{br}A gift from His Majesty? Oh, what an honor!{w}{br}Lord Arvis, be sure to pass my deepest gratitude for this onto the king!{w}
Very well. Incidentally, Sigurd, rumor has it that my brother, Azel,{w} is among your forces. I presume this is true?{w}
Mm, sorry about that.{br}It sounded as if he came behind your back,{w} but I couldn't turn hiim away.{w}{br}If at all possible, would you mind if he remained with me for a while longer?{w}

I see... So long as you keep him safe, then.{w}{br}He and I may have different mothers, but Azel is still my only brother.{w}{br}I'd prefer if he remained by my side, but perhaps this is how it must be...{w}{br}I'll entrust Azel to you, Sigurd.{br}Be sure that he learns from this experience.{w}
You can leave it to me, Lord Arvis.{br}Once we're done here,{w} I'll do what I can to convince him to go home.{w}
Good to hear it.{br}Now, I must return to his Majesty's side in the capital.{w}{br}I'm entrusting this crisis to you, Sigurd.{w}

name: Outro
commands: Sire, we've completed our search of the castle.{w}{br}Lady Aideen is nowhere to be found.{w}
She was most likely taken deeper into Verdane before we arrived.{w}{br}...I hope she's alright.{w}
Gah... I won't let them get away with this...{w}{br}They can run, but until they surrender Aideen, they won't escape me!{w}
Sire, an envoy from His Majesty is seeking an audience with you{w}
Lord Sigurd, your performance in this battle was outstanding.{w}{br}His Majesty is highly pleased,{w} and has thus proclaimed your ordination as a paladin of the realm.{w}
I hardly deserve such an honor, sir!{br}I pledge my undying fealty to His Majesty.{w}

From here, it is imperative that you hold Evans.{w}{br}We can ill afford to lose such a valuable defensive point to the enemy.{w}{br}You and your men shall be handsomely paid for your service.{w}{br}Provided, of course, that our territory survives unscathed.{w}{br}Best of luck, Lord Sigurd. Grannvale expects every man to do his duty.{w}

name: DeathSigurd
commands: Oh sire...{br}We have no hope of victory now...

name: DeathAlec
commands: Gah... Got unlucky...{br}Lord Sigurd...{br}Good luck out there...

name: DeathAyra

name: DeathDew

commands: W-Why... Why am I... Claude... Do something! Please...
W-Why... Why am I... Lex... Do something! Please...
W-Why... Why am I... Dew... Do something! Please...
W-Why... Why am I... Alec... Do something! Please...

name: DeathErinys
commands: Ah... Queen Lahna... Please forgive me...

name: DeathArden
commands: Lord Sigurd...{br}My life was yours...{br}I don't regret a thing...

name: DeathNoish
commands: Lord Sigurd...{br}My apologies...{br}Take care of yourself...

name: DeathAzel
commands: Lord Sigurd...{br}The rest... is up to you...

name: DeathLex
commands: I... I'm a fool, am I not?{br}...Sigurd, please...{br}Just let me go in peace...
