name: PreBase
commands: Welcome to your Preparation-Base Menu!!{w} Here you can manage your units equipment,{w} buy some new items and even fight in the arena{w} -which is not available right now-{w} to get some extra gold and experience.{w} But be carefull,{w} depending on the unit you select to fight in the arena,{w} an enemy of the same tier and level{w} will be selected to fight it.
This arena does not work as the original FE4's,{w} just as the GBA ones.{w} Events related to winning in the arena{w} will be re-imagined and added,{w} most probably, in the battle map.{w}

Oh!! and now you can get your items repaired the Blacksmith,{w} make sure to get in therebefore proceeding to the next chapter,{w} for there is no other way to repair them{w} and shops do not have that many existances...

name: Intro
commands: You're doing fine job, soldier.{w}{br}I leave the border's defenses to you.{w}
Sigurd! It's been a long time.{w}{br}Pray tell, why do I find you suddenly occupying Evans?{w}{br}You couldn't possibly be declaring war on Verdane, could you?{w}

Eldigan! Am I glad to see you.{w}{br}Listen. The Verdanites have abducted Lady Aideen of Jungby.{w}{br}They've made it amply clear that they don't plan on releasing her.{w}{br}Taking her back by force is our only option.{w}

Ah, I see. That makes sense.{w}{br}Well, whatever you do, you cannot afford to leave Evans unattended.{w}{br}My fellow Agustrian lords have been of a rancorous sort of late...{w}{br}Ah, I know. I'll ensure they don't threaten you from behind.{w}
I'm sorry to involve you in this as well.{w}{br}Say, Eldigan, once I'm done here, what do you say to a catch up?{w}{br}You, me, a fine bottle of wine...{br}Just like old times.{w}
Mm... I'm looking forward to it.{w}{br}I trust I'll see you later, then.{w}{br}May luck be with you this day, Sigurd!{w}
Listen up, Ayra! You know the deal.{w}{br}While I'm out, you guard the palace, right up to your very last breath{w}{br}Remember, first sign of funny business, and it's the brat's head.{w}
Ayra! Ayra, I'll be alright!{br}Don't give in to these thugs!{w}{br}Don't let 'em boss you around!{w}
Look, Kinbois, you have my word.{w}{br}So long as you leave Shannan alone, you'll have no trouble.{w}{br}But I wonder if, once this battle is over, you actually plan to return him to me.{w}
Ahahahahaha!{w}{br}You got nothing to worry about.{br}If we get Evans back, you get him back.{w}

I understand.{w}{br}But be warned, Kinbois: if you break your promise, you'll deeply regret it.{w}{br}Cross me, and I will pursue you to the very depths of the inferno itself, till I take your head.{w}{br}Remember this well!{w}

Wh-whoa, settle down there!{w}{br}I don't believe it... Such a cute face, but you only use it to spew bile like that!{w}{br}I'm not about to make an enemy outta someone with a sword arm as fine as yours.{w}{br}I can promise that.{w}
Shannan, sit tight.{br}Be patient for just a bit longer.{w}
Ayra, no!{br}Don't do it! Don't go!{w}
Feh... Right, boys, we're moving out! We're taking back Evans!{w}

name: Intro
commands: Lachesis, I'm leaving for Agusty.{w}{br}I can't rest until I've convinced King Chagall to end his foolish warmongering.{w}
Please don't do it, brother!{w}{br}You know as well as I that Chagall murdered his father himself.{w}{br}You'll only be endangering yourself for a lost cause.{w}{br}He won't listen to you!{w}

You mustn't say such things about your king!{w}{br}I, too, have heard the rumors of King Chagall's involvement,{w}{br}but they are just that: rumors.{w}{br}There remains no evidence against him.{w}{br}Surely, His Majesty will see reason in this matter, if I simply persuade him.{w}

Enough!{w}{br}I'll leave three of my finest knights here to defend Nordion,{w} should the worst come to pass.{w}{br}Lachesis, you needn't loo so sad.{br}I will be back. I promise.{w}{br}I'm not about to abandon you in death.{w}

Please, Your Majesty!{br}Reconsider your militant ambitions.{w}{br}Your father before you worked so hard to build an era of peace with Grannvale.{w}{br}A war will only bring ruin to our people,{w}{br}bringing disgrace upon your good name for generations to come.{w}{br}I implore you: do not start a war!{w}

So it's you... Eldigan of Nordion. You dastard...{w}{br}My father adored you, and you used his trust to undercut me at every turn.{w}{br}But now, my father is no more...{br}And long live the king of all Agustria!{w}{br}For years you've made me play the fool, and now, I will reward you in kind.{w}{br}Guards! Throw this man in the dungeon!{w}
Pfeh! Good riddance, the eyesore.{w}{br}Send my orders to Boldor at Heirhein:{br}Seize Nordion Castle!{w}{br}Once that nuisance is dealt with, we're clear to throw all we've got at Grannvale!{w}
Your Majesty, King Chagall...{w}{br}I see you've made your decision at last.{w}
Manfroy? Yes, just as we agreed.{br}Father is dead, and by my hand...{w}{br}There is no turning back now. Even so, I still don't know if we stand a chance.{w}
Remember, Grannvale still adheres to that tawdry old peace treaty with you,{w}{br}and their entire army is distracted in Isaach.{w}{br}Strike now, and you could not possibly fail.{w}
You're right.{w}{br}Grannvale's downfall will mark the rise of Agustria as Jugdral's new leading power!{w}{br}"Chagall, Emperor of the World"...{br}I like the sound of that.{w}
Hmmhmhm... We can only hope your ambition will be rewarded.{w}
Milady! We've received word that Lord Eldigan was arrested in Agusty!{w}
What?! You must be joking!{w}{br}Oh... Why didn't I try harder...{br}I shouldn't have let him go...{w}

That isn't our only problem, milady.{w}{br}With Lord Eldigan gone, we need to be aware of Heirhein's movements.{w}{br}Knowing of his lordship's absence, a strike from them is inevitable.{w}{br}After the Verdane incident, they're most likely out for revenge on us.{w}{br}Especially Lord Elliot.{w}

Ugh, that Elliot...{w}{br}I can't believe how many times I've had to tell him I'm not interested in him.{w}{br}Smug, self-absorbed swine like him are the absolute worst!{w}{br}If only more men were cut from the same cloth as Eldie...{w}{br}It's too bad they aren't, else perhaps someone would stand a chance to marry me...{w}{br} Perhaps...{w}

Er... Be that as it may,{w}{br}Lord Eldigan's Cross Knights are still dispatched to the north at Fort Silvail,{w}{br} well away from here.{w}{br}We three are all who remain.{br}Nordion is vulnerable, and they know it.{w}{br}Rest assured, my brothers and I will do all we can to defend the castle,{w}{br}but the odds are against us.{br}I'm sorry, milady.{w}
Very well. Thank you, Eve. But please, look after yourselves.{w}{br}Don't waste your lives for me.{w}{br}Be sure to tell Eva and Alva that I'm sorry for this.{w}

We are not worthy of such kind words, milady.{w} Even so, Lord Eldigan handpicked us to defend you.{w}{br} Our lord gave us a task. and we will see it through.{w}{br}As paladins of Nordion, our lives are yours, no matter what.{w}{br}To our dying breaths, we live to defend you!{w}

Let me get this straight.{w}{br}Eldigan ticked off the king and got himself a little prison time for his troubles?{w}{br}Ahahaha, that's perfect!{br}Elliot! Lay siege to Nordion at once!{w}{br}Let's see some tears roll down Eldigan's cheeks!{w}
Sire, we have trouble!{w}{br}It appears that Lord Eldigan has been taken prisoner and Nordion is under attack.{w}{br}I bear a message from Lady Lachesis, pleading for aid.{w}

They've taken Eldigan?!{w}{br}Why.. Why in the world would they treat a man so esteemed this way?{w}{br}Inform everybody to make ready.{br}We ride for Nordion at once!{w}{br}No matter the cost, Lachesis needs us.{w}{br}He might never admit it, but Lachesis has always been dear to Eldigan.{w}{br}The loss of Lachesis would gravely wound him...{w}
Milord... You're preparing for another battle, aren't you?{w}
I'm sorry, Deirdre. I owe so much to Eldigan.{w}{br}I could never abandon his sister in a time like this.{w}
I thought as much. I'm not about to stop you. No... I'll accompany you.{w}
What?! No, I can't allow that! I refuse to endanger you like this.{w}

Milord, do you not remember our vows?{w}{br}You swore to never leave my side, and... I'm.. uneasy...{w}{br}I have a feeling that if you and I were to part,{w}{br}we would never find each other again...{w}{br}Please, grant me this. Let me stay by your side...{w}
I'm sorry... you're right. I did promise.{w}{br}Very well! Let us ride together.{w}{br}But you mustn't leave my side.{w}

...Sigh.{w}{br}So Prince Mariccle has decided to finish the war in one last battle against Grannvale...{w}{br}He will certainly perish, there's nothing Isaach can do against Grannvale's might...{w}{br}And here this stupid lords seem to be starting a civil war...{w}{br}Well, either side would pay well for my sword.{w}{br}After all, I've never been beaten so far...{w}{br}But first, I'll prepare for tomorrow's Tournament at Evans' Arena,{w} then we will see if there's someone worth to sell my sword to.{w}

name: Narration
commands: Sigurd's capture of Evans Castle comes too late.{w} Aideen is not there, instead already well within Verdane's borders.{w}
Verdane's territory is blanketed in a thick sweep of forest.{w}{br}The nation is widely dubbed a "barbarian kingdom" by Grannvale's people,{w} owing to their constant raids on Grannvalian soil.{w}

However, the reign of King Batur has seen an end to Verdane's infamous border raids.{w}{br}A pacifist, King Batur has long worked to build a lasting peace with Grannvale,{w} while also keeping his aggressive sons appeased.{w}{br}Ultimately, however, it was Batur himself who violated the peace he held so dear.{w}{br}Batur's three sons have enexpectedly launched an assault on Grannvale.{w}
Kinbois, the second son, lord of Genoa...{w}
Gandolf, the eldest, lord of Marpha...{w}
And Jamke, the youngest of the three.{w}{br}Lurking deep within Verdane territory, the three now await the arrival of Sigurd.{w}

Aideen's fate...{br}Batur's sudden belligerence...{w}{br}Sprawling before Sigurd lie the great forests of Verdane -{w} and within them, the answers he seeks.{w}{br}He prepares to take his first steps into the spirit forest of folklore...{w}

name: Narration
commands: On orders from Belhalla,{w}{br}Sigurd governs the region from Evans Castle, with his newly-wed wife Deirdre ever at his side.{w}

However, Grannvale's actions in Verdane are ill received by neighboring Agustria.{w}{br}The lords of Agustria lead a storm of heated rhetoric denouncing Grannvale.{w}{br}To make matters worse, the renowned pacifistic Agustrian ruler, King Imca,{w}{br}has been slain by an unknown hand.{w}
Imca's successor to the Agustrian crown is his firstborn son, Prince Chagall.{w}
Even as the Agustrian crisis unfolds,{br}the bulk of Grannvale's army remains in Isaach.{w}
And so, Chagall has given the lords his first command as their new king: Invade Verdane.{w}
As the sole defender of Grannvale's front,{br}Sigurd once again finds himself in battle...{w}

name: NorthVillage
commands: Barely a month goes by without him settin' his army on us. It's terrifyin'!{w}{br} King Batur, his father, used to do such a fine job of keepin' him in check.{w}{br}I can hardly image what's goin' on...{br}Anyway, glad you stopped by!{w}

name: East1Village
commands: Beware of Bishop Clement, the lord of Mackily Castle.{w}{br}That dastard wields a magical staff that they call a Sleep Staff.{w}{br}If you're not careful, you'll find yourseld snoozin' and wide open to bein' attacked.{w}

name: West1Village
commands: Hey, thanks for saving us! I want you to have this, one of my favorite things.{w}{br}It's a pretty little bracelet, huh? Wear it at the shops and the nice man there'll be happy to give ya a discount!{w}

name: West2Village
commands: Anphony's Lord Macbeth is the foulest, most gold-obsessed man there it.{w}{br}He does nothin' but torment us for his own profit.{w}{br}I wish I could kill 'em with my bare hands!{w}

name: West3Village
commands: Psst! Wanna hear somethin' saucy?{br}Y'know that Lord Eldigan has a li'l  sister, right?{w}{br}Well, lookin' at 'em, wouldn't ya say there's more to it than that? If ya know what I mean...{w}{br}Ohoho! I love me a li'l bit of gossip!{w}{br}Hmm? I've better things to do than run me mouth y'say? Fine, then.{w}

name: Center1Village
commands: Lord Eldigan is a sincere and righteous man, but alas, his sincerity's never been welcome to the ears of King Chagall.{w}{br}That's gotta be why he was locked up. Please, for the good of all Agustria... Help Lord Eldigan!{w}

name: Center2Village
commands: War's the most dreadful thing, and 'tis always the innocent and helpless who suffers most for it.{w}{br}Please... go home to your families.{w}

name: Center3Village
commands: We can't thank you enough for helpin' us.{br}This here sword's the best we can do.{w}{br}It's an unusual sort, innit? They call it an armour cutter.{w}{br}In the right hands it'll cleave right through the thickest armor.{w}{br}If your hands aren't the right hands, though? Maybe it can make ya a quick but at the pawn shop in town.{w}

name: East2Village
commands: The late King Imca was truly a great man.{w}{br}His sudden passisg has been nothin' but devastating for us all.{w}{br}He's barely been buried for long and his son Chagall's already running the country into the ground!{w}{br}If Lord Eldigan had claim to the throne, somehow, the we wouldn't be in this mess...{w}

name: East3Village
commands: There's still gotta be descendants of the dark Lord Loptyr livin' somewhere, right?{w}{br}Folk in the big cities like Agusty an' Mackily certainly seem to think so.{w}{br}Every year they do theese huge hunts for Loptyr's spawn.{w}{br}They arrest a ton of people, then burn' em all at the stake, if they're innocent... Madness, I tell ya!{w}

name: East4Village
commands: The great Lord Eldigan of Nordion is a descendant of Hezul the Brave, one of The Twelve Crusaders.{w}{br}He wield's Hezul'l old weapon, Mystletainn, the demon blade.{w}{br}They say it's as strong as Isaach's Balmung and Chalphy's Tyrfing...{w}{br}Three of the mightiest blades in all of creation.{w}

name: SouthVillage
commands: Just t'the north a here is this mighty woodland. S'called the spirit forest.{w}{br}Once upon a time, I lived there too, in this li'l hamlet deep within.{w}{br}Th' village is home to the last kin o' the dark one of old, Loptyr.{w}{br}They say it all started with Saint Maira,{w}{br}exiled by the empire for darin' to sympathize with mortal men.{w}{br}In my day, there was this gorgeous girl livin' there called Cigyun:{w}{br}the last heir o' Loptyr's bloodline, she was.{w}{br}She lived 'er life under close guard,{w}{br}the villagers wary o' lettin' the blood o' Loptyr loose into the world.{w}{br}Alas, Cigyun grew weary o' the tedious forest life an' she left it all behind,{w}{br}breakin' ancient commandments.{w}{br}A couple o' years later, she came back, 'cept now she was pregnant.{w}{br}Never said who the father was, mind.{w}{br}Before long Cigyun died, even as she gave birth t' her daughter.{w}{br}From what I 'eard, the hamlet's old prophet took 'er in and raised the girl as 'er own.{w}{br}If the little girl's still alive, she'd 'ave to be 'bout seventeen or eighteen by now...{w}

name: CenterVillage
commands: King Batur is as gentle as they come.{w}{br}Normally, at least, leading a war like this is the last thing he'd ever do.{w}{br}Mark my words: This is all the doing of Sandima, his sorcerous advisor. I can just feel it{w}{br}Eking out a living here's grown tougher and tougher since the day that man arrived,{w}{br} and save for the youngest son, Jamke, both king and country are at his every whim.{w}{br}Please, I beg you... Save our country!{br}Bring back the Verdane that once was!{w}

name: LexAxe
condition: region.nid == 'LadyLake' and unit.nid == 'Lex' and unit.get_weapon().nid == 'Iron Axe'
commands: What you dropped...{w}{br}Was it this golden axe?{br}Or perhaps, this silver axe?{w}
Oh, no. My axe isn't anything as fine{br}as those two. It's just a plain old iron axe.{w}
Such an honest person... As a reward...{br}I present you with this brave axe...{w}{br}Farewell, Lord Lex...{w}
Such a liar you've become...{br}For this your axe will be completely lost.{w}

name: DeirdreJoins
commands: Hm? Is that... Deirdre! Ah!{br}So this must be your spirit forest.{w}{br}Thank the gods!{w}{br}For a moment I thought that I might{br}never see you again.{w}
Milord, listen. The dark priest Sandima guards{br}Castle Verdane with his wicked magic.{w}{br}You must go no further. You would surely be killed.{w}{br}Please, you mustn't go...{w}
But I mustn't place my men in even greater{br}danger, either. I have no choice but to go.{w}
...I see. Then I will go with you.{w}

This is called a Silence staff.{w}{br}So long as my own power is enough{br}to pierce his magical resistances,{w}{br}it will seal his magic away.{br}Trust me, milord.{w}{br}I'll ensure his far spells never{w} harm anyone ever again.{w}
I'd never imagined that you'd have such power...{br}But why... Why are you helping me?{w}
...I tried to forget you all I could,{br}but it was all in vain.{w}{br}...I no longer know what I should do...{w}
What is it you're afraid of, Deirdre?{br}I don't understand.{w}{br}But if you and I feel the same way,{br}then surely we've nothing to fear.{w}{br}I... I love you, Deirdre...{w}

name: ElliotRuns
commands: Oof... Men, retreat!{w}{br}Mark my words, Eldigan!{br}This isn't over!{w}
Elliot has fled? Very well.{w}{br}Leave him to lick his wounds.{w}{br}We're done here. Withdraw!{w}

name: Outro
commands: Sire, we've found a casualty in the palace.{w}{br}It's... It's King Batur himself.{w}{br}He's severely wounded.{w}{br}By the look of it, he's well beyond help.{w}
King Batur! Are you alright?{br}Please, come on... you can make it!{w}

Hnnh... Lord... Sigurd?.{w}{br}I am so sorry for doing all of this to you...{br}I let Sandima... lead me astray...{w}{br}He... he abused my trust...{w} and won over my sons...{w}{br}all to seize control of Verdane for himself...{w}
I understand, Your Highness,{w} but you need to rest now.{w}{br}Please, you mustn't stress yourself further.{w}

No... It's too late for me... Heed my word, Sigurd,{w} for there is one final thing I must tell you...{w}{br}The misery here...{w} the grief spreading across Jugdral...{w} it is all the will of the Dark Priesthood...{w}{br}They blight our world from the shadows, all...{w}{br}all in the name of the revival of their dark god, Loptyr...{w}{br}Sandima... was one of them...{w}{br}He twitsted us to war with Grannvale...{br}for the sake of the cult's madness.{w}{br}The... the dark priests...{w}{br}they infect every corner of our world... Sigurd...{w}{br}Stay vigilant, lest you be tricked too!{w}{br}I... I failed the people of Verdane...{w} Sigurd, I beg you...{w} Make this right... Protect... my... people...{w}
Oh... Your Highness...{w}{br}The Dark Priesthood?{br}What in the blazes is happening...?{w}

name: Outro
commands: Sire, we've found a casualty in the palace.{w}{br}It's... It's King Batur himself.{w}{br}He's severely wounded.{w}{br}By the look of it, he's well beyond help.{w}
King Batur! Are you alright?{br}Please, come on... you can make it!{w}

Hnnh... Lord... Sigurd?.{w}{br}I am so sorry for doing all of this to you...{br}I let Sandima... lead me astray...{w}{br}He... he abused my trust...{w} and won over my sons...{w}{br}all to seize control of Verdane for himself...{w}
I understand, Your Highness,{w} but you need to rest now.{w}{br}Please, you mustn't stress yourself further.{w}

No... It's too late for me... Heed my word, Sigurd,{w} for there is one final thing I must tell you...{w}{br}The misery here...{w} the grief spreading across Jugdral...{w} it is all the will of the Dark Priesthood...{w}{br}They blight our world from the shadows, all...{w}{br}all in the name of the revival of their dark god, Loptyr...{w}{br}Sandima... was one of them...{w}{br}He twitsted us to war with Grannvale...{br}for the sake of the cult's madness.{w}{br}The... the dark priests...{w}{br}they infect every corner of our world... Sigurd...{w}{br}Stay vigilant, lest you be tricked too!{w}{br}I... I failed the people of Verdane...{w} Sigurd, I beg you...{w} Make this right... Protect... my... people...{w}
Oh... Your Highness...{w}{br}The Dark Priesthood?{br}What in the blazes is happening...?{w}

name: AyraRecruit
commands: Genoa has fallen to Grannvale?!{w}{br}No! I... I must get to Shannan!{w}
Hold, Lady Ayra!{br}Prince Shannan is safe with us!{w}{br}You needn't keep fighting.{w}
What? You saved Shannan?{w}{br}Do you speak the truth!?{w}

I do. Prince Shannan told me everything:{w}{br}that you're the daughter of the late{br}Isaachian king.{w}{br}Listen. You detest Grannvalians.{w}{br}You've made your hostility perfectly clear.{w}{br}But you can't neglect your duty to the prince.{w}{br}You can't afford to waste your life now,{w} not on a battle as senseless as this.{w}

My brother, the crown prince, entrusted Shannan to my care knowing{w}{br}that his death was inevitable.{w}{br}You're right. After all this time, I refuse to die for Verdane's sake.{w}{br}Until I've seen Shannan rise to the Isaachian throne, my life is not mine{w}{br}to forfeit to such dogs.{w}
I will aid you all I can, if you lower your sword.{w}{br}On my honor as the heir of Baldr the Crusader,{w}{br}I swear I will not betray you.{w}

Very well. I'll place my trust in you, as well...{w}{br}Such is the way of the warriors of Isaach.{w}{br}For now, I pledge my blade in your service.{w}{br}However, this does not change that Grannvale is my foe.{w}{br}Beware, for if one day that includes you... I will not hesitate.{w}
Mm, war can be truly cruel.{w}{br}Ayra, Isaachian warrior...{br} I pray that day never comes{w}
Oi, oi, oi! What do you lot think you're doing out there!?{w}{br}The rest of you, get put there and fight! Now!{w}{br}Don't let them touch the castle!{w}

name: AideenDewSpawn
commands: Come on, Aideen!{br}Take the brat and get out of here, and quickly!{w}{br}You need to get as far away as you can before Gandolf finds out!{w}
Pardon me, Prince Jamke, but are you not joining us?{w}
No. I won't stand for my brothers' vile ways but I just won't betray my father, either.{w}{br}I'm going back to the capital.{w}{br}I'm going to try, one more time, to convince my father.{w}

You're right... We must do all we can do to end this war as soon as possible.{w}{br}Prince Jamke, I would sooner not burden you alone,{w} but you are our only hope to persuade King Batur to end this.{w}
Aideeeeeeeeeeeeeen! C'mon, hurry up!{w}{br}We're still in serious danger here.{w}{br}If they catch me this time, then Gandolf'll rip my tongue out for sure!{w}

Dew, you're a thief. You got caught in the act.{w}{br}Any tongue rippings you get are your own fault.{w}{br}If Aideen hadn't insisted on letting you go too, you'd still be sitting in chains.{w}{br}Now what did you promise to do?{w}
I know, I know. I promised Aideen, too. I'm washing my hands of thievin' from now on.{w}{br}Can I go now?{w}
I'll take your word for it.{br}Now, go already!{w}

What?! Jamke let the broad go and went scurrying back to the capital?{w}{br}Gah! Damn my rat of a brother!{w}{br}Boys! We're taking the wench and the brat back!{w}{br}If they put up a fight, kill 'em if you have to!{w}

name: ElliotEldiganSpawn
commands: Tch.. Does Grannvale really think it can just waltz into Verdane with such a tiny force?{w}{br}How adorable.{w}{br}Men, here's our chance.{br}Evans is ripe for the plucking,{w} then it's straight for the Grannvale border!{w}
Is that...? No!!{w}{br}That's the Heirhein army!{w}{br}Lord Eldigan won't like this...{w}
What's this?{w}{br}Heirhein's army is marching on Evans!?{w}{br}Ugh... I should've known Elliot just couldn't keep his nose out of this.{w}
Take care of the castle, Lachesis.{w}{br}Sigurd is in dire need of my help.{w}
Of course, brother.{w}{br}Please, do all you can to help Sir Sigurd.{w}
Right! Cross Knights, move out!{w}{br}Our foe is the Heirhein army.{w}{br}I don't expect a challenge,{w}{br}but stay alert nonetheless!{w}

Elliot!{br}Ambushing them like a common thief, aren't you?{w}{br}A cowardly act, ill befitting the honor of a knight!{w}{br}Withdraw inmediatly or I will take action.{w}{br}We both know you're no match for me.{w}
What's this? Eldigan!?{br}I should have known you would side with Grannvale!{w}

In doing this you are crossing not just Grannvale, nor me, but your very liege!{w}{br}We bow to the reverent King Imca,{br}who desires only peace with Grannvale.{w}{br}Would you truly cross His Majesty?{w}
You fool!{w}{br}Only you would still seriously heed that senile old fool's word.{w}{br}The lords of Agustria are united against{w}{br}both Grannvale and any peace with them!{w}

Wrong, for I will not stand with you!{w}{br}Agustria cannot afford the crippling tolls of war,{w} and nor can Grannvale.{w}{br}Our past stands as a testament to this.{w}{br}Learn well, Elliot: we, the nobility, know not{br}the suffering brought by war.{w}{br}War cripples only the powerless, our subjects.{w}{br}I will not abide your lust for glory{w}{br}at the expenses of our people!{w}

A pretty little speech, but that won't save you now.{w}{br}I knew all along: you and I were always{br} fated to clash, Eldigan!{w}{br}Today, we settle this, once and for all!{w}{br}Men, the enemy is now House Nordion!{w}{br}I want Eldigan's head on a platter!{w}

name: AyraAttack
commands: So it's finally time...{br}Woe be to all who cross me!

name: HeirheinSeized
commands: Heirhein is secure, sire. What are you thinking for our next move?{w}{br}Do we pull out?{w}
Hm... The imminent danger has passed.{br}Nordion should be safe now,{w}{br}but Eldigan is still being held in the capital. Furthermore...{w}
I'm hearing that the frontier towns in the central forests are grappling with bandit raids.{w}{br}We can't afford to leave them be.{w}

Agreen. It is crucial that we help the locals,{w}{br}that we might convince them we aren't their enemy.{w}{br}In that case, we must ride for the north at once.{w}{br}There's no time to waste. Let's go!{w}

name: AnphonySeized
commands: Sire, we have a visitor.{br}Lord Filat of Belhalla seeks an audience.{w}
Lord Filat, I presume? Thank you for coming.{w}
Lord Sigurd, the Agustrian conflict has escalated into full-scale war, I see.{w}{br}How does this battle look at the moment?{w}
We're faring well so far, somehow, but this hasn't been easy by any means.{w}
Incidentally, Lord Sigurd, I regret to say that I come bearing bad news...{w}

Nasty rumors have emerged of late in the royal court... and they concern you.{w}{br}The rumors claim that, in concert with Quan of Lenster and Eldigan of Nordion,{w}{br}you're conspiring against the crown.{w}{br}This, it is said, is why you're harboring the prince of Isaach in your ranks.{w}
What?! That's absurd! Who in the world could've started such nonsense...{w}
I see... I should have known, knowing their disdain for my father.{w}{br}Yet, to take that grudge so far...{w}

Those two are ruled by their envy of your father's immense power,{w}{br}as he is Prince Kurth's only and direct advisor, I'd say.{w}{br}They likely believe a Chalphy-controlled prince{w}{br}will strip the mof their influence once he takes the throne.{w}{br}Fear and jealousy dominate their lives...{br}Don't let your guard down against them.{w}
Thank you, sir. I appreciate the warning.{w}{br}By the way, sir... Pray tell, how goes the Isaachian campaign? Is there an end in sight?{w}
It seems there is indeed, from what I've heard.{w}{br}We expect the triumphant return of the prince and your father any day now.{w}

Thakn the gods Prince Kurth is safe.{w}{br}Losing him to this war would have dealt such a blow to to Grannvale's future...{w}{br}I know my father worries so much,{w}{br}about how the Belhalla lineage would end with His Majesty's death, unmarried as he is.{w}
Indeed. Before the war started, we tried to hasten him to search for a wife.{w}
If I may, is there a problem?{w}
Indeed... The story behind this has been well known in the royal court for a long time now.{w}{br}Regrettably, His Highness struggles to move on from a long-lost love.{w}
Really? Why did he never marry this person?{w}

Well... Perhaps I ought to tell you the complete tale.{w}{br}This happened some twenty years ago.{w}{br}Prince Kurth had an affair with the duchess of Velthomer,{w}{br}a truly lovely womas as I recall.{w}Duke Victor of Velthomer was...{w}{br}Well, he was a philanderer of the worst degree, and had countless lovers.{w}{br}The prince of course, is nothing like him.{w}{br}He wished only to support the duchess at first, but the two soon fell deeply in love.{w}{br}Victor was distraught, needless to say.{w}{br}He penned a letter denouncing the pair, then he took his own life.{w}{br}The duchess could bear to stay no longer.{w}{br}She fled Grannvale and was never seen again.{w}{br}As I recall, her name was Cigyun.{w}
...Wow. That's horrible...{br}So she was Lord Arvis' mother...{w}
Indeed.{w}{br}I can scarcely imagine what this was like for him...{br}Losing both parents at only the age of seven...{w}
Mm.. And yet, I feel sorry for the prince.{br}Not to mention, for Cigyun as well...{w}

Oh! My apologies.{w}{br}I'm sure a soldier of you caliber has better things to worry about than court gossip.{w}{br}Please, don't worry about the story.{br}You have a war with Agustria to win, after all!{w}{br}Farewell, Lord Sigurd. We look forward to the day that you, too, return to the fatherland in triumph.{w}

name: MackilySeized
commands: Good.Mackily is ours.{br}That leaves the capital, Agusty...{w}
Indeed, sire, but don't get too careless.{w}{br}We've been informed that Agusty still hosts a sizable defensive force.{w}}{br}We ought to take utmost care.{w}
Mm, you're right. Who knows what that Chagall has up his sleeve...{w}

name: ElliotAttack
commands: Lady Lachesis of Nordion, huh...{br}I've been looking forward to this.{w}{br}She's been playing cruel games with my heart for years...{w}{br}But look how the tables have turned!{w}{br}I've an army behind me, against her insignificant guard.{w}{br}What could she possibly do?{w}{br}She's powerless to resist coming back to Heirhein with me! And who knows...{w}{br}Perhaps one day she'll admit she wants it.{w}
Our task is form a defensive line.{w}{br}Don't let the enemy lure you from your post.{br}Stand your ground! Understood?{w}

So Heirhein's finally made their move...{w}{br}Perfect. Release the brigands on the villages, as we arranged!{w}{br}Under the old king, you couldn't even dare to meddle in any of his property...{w}{br}Yet it is the easiest thing to cheat Chagall!{w}{br}Strip everything of worth you find and bring it back here.{w}{br}Leave no stone unturned!{w}
Heirhein is going for Nordion's throat?{br}Hm... who do I side with here?{w}{br}Let's wait and see how this unfolds.{w}{br}Instruct the men to remain where they are until the dust settles.{w}

name: LewynSylviaSpawn
commands: You imbecile! You turned your back on this crisis to line your own pockets,{w}{br}and now we've lost Heirhein!{w}{br}There had better be a good explanation for your behavior, Macbeth!{w}
Er, um... My humblest apologies, Your Majesty!{br}Forgive me, I beg you!{w}{br}I've already sent the order for Voltz's sellsword unit to move in at once.{w}

Hrmph. There's the order to move in.{br}Guess we don't 'ave much of a choice now.{w}{br}Bet he's gonna send us in, then 'ave his men turn tail right when we need 'em.{w}{br}I'm stayin' put till I see how this all plays out.{br}Oi, Beowulf, how 'bout you?{w}
Yeah, I ain't up for this at all, Voltz.{w}{br}That Macbeth swine really rubs me the wrong way. I'm this close to just walkin' off the job.{w}
You're a free man, Beowulf.{br}If a job isn't right for you, you're free to quit it.{w}{br}That's the funny thing about mercenaries, innit? Today's pals are tomorrow's foes.{w}
Amen to that. Hopefully we're not gonna end up enemies someday.{w}{br}Wouldn't have a hope in hell against you, would I?{w}
Heh... Ain't met anybody in the shole world who can take me!{w}
What's going on, sir? What's all that din outside?{w}
Well, well! The bard's still here, are you?{w}{br}You oughta get outta here.{br}We've got bandits headed out way.{w}
Bandits? Isn't the Agustrian army doing something about them?{w}

The army? Hah! That's rich, boy!{w}{br}The army's too busy with their little civil war to deal with our problems.{w}{br}Clearly that's more important than our safety.{br}Actually, that's not all...{w}{br}Rumor is, the Lord of Anphony himself is pullin' the bandits' strings here.{w}
Oh, you've gotta be kidding me. That's it. That guy's gotta go.{w}{br}I'll go sort out the bandits, okay?{w}{br}Now, how big a reward will be waiting here for me when I get back?{w}
Still full of hot air, are ya?{br}Just get outta here, wise guy.{w}{br}Nobody here's got the time to listen to you blowing your own horn.{w}
Oh, come on! A little confidence would be nice.{w}
Oi! Lewyn! Runnin' off behind my back now, are ya?{w}
Sylvia?! Damn! Er.. I mean... your found me!{w}
Yeah, I found ya!{w}{br}You've had your fun with me, so you're just dumpin' me without as much as a goodbye?{w}

Hey, careful with that tongue of yours!{br}We barely just met here a week ago!{w}{br}We've only been out for dinner for... What, two or three times?{w}{br}You're a dancer. I'm a bard...{br}There's not much else to it.{w}
But... But you called me adorable!{br}That... That really meant a lot to me...{w}

Er... Sometimes I just say things and don't really mean them...{w}{br}Oh, come on! Enough with the tears!{w}{br}Things'll probable get more than a bit rough out there, though. Think you'll be okay?{w}
Geez... She was crying her eyes out just a few seconds ago.{w}{br}It's like she never really grew up...{w}

name: VoltzSpawn
commands: Right, it's show time!{w}{br}Boys, you know the drill. Surrender ain't an option.{w}{br}Let's show 'em how real men fight!{w}
Oh, that must be Agusty Castle!{br}I'd say we're due for a break.{w}{br}Hopefully we'll be able to find a lead on Prince Lewyn's whereabouts in town.{w}

name: MackilySpawn
commands: You can't be serious!{br}They've come as far as Anphony?!{w}{br}Are they just going to keep going until all Agustria is theirs?{w}{br}They'll have to come this way.{w}{br}We've no choice but to fight.{br}Deploy the ballistae!{w}{br}We're all that stands between the capital and Grannvale's dogs of war!{w}
King Chagall, with all due respect, may we begin already?{w}{br}I need to find Prince Lewyn as quickly as possible.{w}{br}You said you know his location.{br}That's the only reason I'm here.{w}

Apologies for the delay, knight, but I just received word of a lead for you.{w}{br}I trust you've noticed we're currently contending with a Grannvale invasion?{w}{br}They have taken Prince Lewyn captive!{w}{br}My scouts report that their army is arresting anything{w}{br}and anyone which stands in their way.{w}{br}Your Prince is being held captive in Evans Castle.{br}Reports say that he is soon to face the axe.{w}
She's gone... Pah! Stupid little girl.{w}{br}Ready the Agusty knights to deploy!{br}End those pigs in a single strike!{w}

name: MackilyAttack
condition: unit.position[0] >= 38 and unit.position[1] <= 35 and game.level_vars['MackilySpawn'] == True

name: ZainAttack
condition: unit.position[0] >= 43 and unit.position[1] <= 20 and game.level_vars['MackilySeized'] == True

name: OpenDoors
commands: W-what?! Mackily ahs fallen too? Ugh..{w}{br}Zain! Your unit's our last line of defense.{br}Take the field, immediately!{w}
Cease your whining! Get out there!{w}
Chagall... So quick to panic at the first sign of trouble, are we?{w}
Y-you! Manfroy!!{w}{br}If it weren't for your schemes, I wouldn't be in this mess!{w}{br}How in the blazes will you fix this?!{w}
Heh heh... You exaggerate my role.{w}{br}All I did was advise the removal of the king, obstacle to your ambitions as he was.{w}{br}All else was your choice. Can you doubt this?{w}
I... Damn it all! How is Sigurd's little army even this strong? This isn't fair!{w}{br}Manfroy, I'm begging you... Help me.{br}What am I supposed to do now?!{w}

As I said, this isn't over.{w}{br}As a last resort, I do beleive you have a fellow of use imprisoned here...{w}{br}Yes, I speak of Eldigan.{w}{br}Eldigan and Sigurd have been associates for years.{w}{br}Sigurd will unquestionably listen to Eldigan's counsel.{w}{br}Of course, Eldigan can't do that while locked up, can he? Go apologize to him.{w}
Er... Y-yes, of course! Surely, Eldigan is the answer! Now, if you'll excuse me...{w}
Your Excellency, I bear news from the east.{w}{br}Just now, I bore witness to the assassination of Prince Kurth.{w}

Is that so? Excellent. This grows more interesting, if I do say so myself.{w}{br}With Kurth's death there remains but a single scion to Naga's holy lineage,{w}{br}and that old fool hardly needs our help to die.{w}{br}And then, all that will remain is the restoration of the dark one,{w}{br}and then the world will belong to us...{w}
What of Duke Arvis, Your Excellency?{br}Is he in agreement with your plan?{w}

Why, of course.{w}{br}As a bearer of the dark one's blood, what choice does he have?{w}{br}Not even one of Arvis' stature can afford the widere world learning of his dark heritage,{w}{br}lest he be burned at the stake.{w}{br}Could a man as prideful as Arvis bear to meet such an end?{w}
So he will betray his king and style himself emperor, and...{w}
Indeed... But that will not be enough.{w}{br}Arvis alone cannot restore the dark god.{w}{br}We still need one more person... That woman's daugther.{w}
Men, move out! We may die here today,{br}but we shall die in the fatherland's name!{w}}

name: ArdenRing
commands: ...Sigh. I don't get it. No matter how hard I train or how strong I get,{w}{br}I'm still the butt of every joke 'round here.{w}{br}Maybe if I were more like Alec and Noish, with how they can always be in the front line...{w}{br}That'd be all I need to get a bit of respect, methinks... {w}and maybe a cute lass while I'm at it.. Hee hee.{w}{br}But I'm still just me... Back to the ol' grind, I suppose...{w}{br}Hang on? What's this little ring thing?{w}{br}Ooh, maybe it's one of those magical ones I keep hearing about.{w}{br}That'd be grand, wouldn't it? let's try her on...{w}{br}Hm... Hwooooarh! W-what's this power I'm feeling?!{w}{br}Is this what Alec and Noish feel like all the time while on their horses?{w}

name: MackilyConvo
condition: ((unit.position[0] == 38 and unit.position[1] == 34) or (unit.position[0] == 39 and unit.position[1] == 35) or (unit.position[0] == 57 and unit.position[1] == 34) or (unit.position[0] == 56 and unit.position[1] == 35)) and game.level_vars['HeirheinSeized'] == True and unit.team == 'player'
commands: Sigh... Who in their right mind would want to be sent to this blasted outlook?{w}{br}To think that even at a time like this, I, the pride of the Agustrian ballisticians, am... Hm? Somebody there?{w}

name: DeirdreEthlynTalk
commands: How are you faring so far, Deirdre?{w}{br}I know my brother is worried something fierce about you risking your life like this.{w}
Ethlyn...? Thank you for asking,{br} but I'm doing just fine for now.{w}{br}Everything will be alright. I can feel it.{w}{br}So long as I'm at Sigurd's side, our happiness will see us through.{w}
I don't think I've ever seen Sigurd as happy as he's been since he met you.{w}{br}He's practically a changed man!{w}
Ethlyn... Here, I'd like you have this.{br}I've been meaning to give it to you for a while.{w}
Oh? ...Is-is this a light sword?!{w}{br}Wow... These are so rare and hard to come by!{w}{br}Are you sure you want to give me this?{w}
Of course. I know it will serve you well.{w}
I can't thank you enough, Deirdre!{br}I'll always treasure it!{w}

name: QuanFinnTalk
commands: Finn, these Agustrians are proving to be far worthier opponents than the thugs of Verdane, woudn't you say?{w}{br}For stronger enemies, what could be more fitting than a stronger weapon?{w}{br}Let's see how you fare with this.{w}
Is that... a Brave Lance?!{w}{br}Are you sure you want to entrust me with such a rarity?{w}

Of course. You are House Lenster's most promising young knight.{w}{br}You are our future, and I'd sooner see you live this day.{w}{br}Arming you properly is the best I can do to help for now, so yes.{w}{br}Take this spear.{w}

name: DewLachesisTalk
commands: Hey! Lachesis! They y'are!{w}{br}Check out this little beauty of a sword!{br}Thought I'd give it to ya.{w}
Oh? I can't say I've seen a blade so peculiar before. Does it have a name?{w}
It's called a Thief Sword. Wanna gut the bad guys? This thing's yer best friend.{w}
Er... Thank you. Although, why are you giving this to me?{w}{br}I'm hardly complaining, but surely you need a decent sword?{w}
Nah, I'm not bothered. There ain't any point in me keeping it.{w}{br}Let's just say it does a lot more than just stab... Heh. See ya around!{w}

name: SigurdLewynTalk
commands: Lewyn, I presume? The one who's been helping defend the villages? I appreciate the aid.{w}{br}As I understan it, you're a bard, but you also wield magic? That's unusual.{w}

Something like that. I guess it's a hobby.{br}You're that Sigurd fellow, aren't you?{w}{br}It's obvious what your little hobby is: war!{w}{br}Clearly you've got so much spare time, you spend it starting war after war!{w}

Don't play dumb! Think about the people of all the countries that you're flattening!{w}{br}You come barging in, swords flashing,{w}{br}and all you do is ruin the lives of normal folk who're trying to make a living here!{w}
You're right. My apologies, Lewyn...{w}{br}I didn't even think about that, but I can't stand knowing I've done  this to them.{w}
Words are just words without actions backing them up.{w}{br}If you really feel so bad, then why not pull your army out?{w}
Mm, you're right... Very well. I'll consult with my troops and arrange a retreat.{w}
Wait, are you serious about this?{w}

Of course. I've been mulling over retreating for a while already,{w}{br}and you just gave me the answer to all of this.{w}{br}I've had enough of the war approach.{w}I think I'd rather seek a diplomatic answer.{w}{br}

Yeah, no.{w}{br}Trying to get through to Chagall now would be a total waste of everyone's time.{w}{br}Besides, if you lot pull out now,{w}{br}then nothing stands between a peeved king and all the citizens who've help you so far.{w}{br}Are you sure you're okay with leaving them all hanging like that?{w}
Ahahaha! Y'know, I guess I was wrong about you.{w}{br}Alright, Sigurd. Say, why don't I help you finish this fight up?{w}
Er... Okay, I suppose... Who are you, anyway?{w}
Who, me? Just a wayward troubadour, my friend...{w}

name: SylviaSigurdTalk
commands: Eee! It's the great Lord Sigurd!{w}
Er... Hello, there? You're a dancer, right?{w}{br}The battlefield is too dangerous for the likes of you.{w}{br}Go back to the castle.{w}
Come on, sir! Don'tcha know who I am?{w}{br}I'm Sylviaaaaaaaa!{w}{br}You can call me Silvie if ya want, though!{w}
Look, I'm sorry, but I really don't have the time to look after children.{w}{br}Be a good little girl and run along back to the castle, alright?{w}

Rrrgh... Good little girl?! Look at me!{w}{br}How d'you look at someone this hot and think "little girl"?!{w}{br}What's wrong with you?{w}{br}Never thought ya'd be such a borin' old stiff, just like everyone else 'round here...{w}
Enough! I have work to do.{w}
Sigh... Oh, well. Back to being a lone, delicate flower, sprouting in a battlefield...{w}{br}My beauty is nothing to the tide of bodies...{w}
Ugh... What in the world is...{w}

name: BeowulfLachesisTalk
commands: Hey, you! You're that Nordion lady, aren't ya?{w}
E-excuse me?! Such boorishness!{w}{br}What manner of lowlife is asking?{w}
Oh, er, sorry 'bout that, ma'am.{br}The name's Beowulf, a hired blade.{w}

Uh... Well, I just wanted to give ya a quick heads up about fightin'.{w}{br}See, war ain't the fun games you're used to.{w}{br}And someone as green as you...{br}Well, you're just gonna get in the way.{w}{br}Besides, a princess's a princess.{br}Why not run along back to your castle now?{w}
H-how dare you! My business in battle is just that:{w}{br}MY business! Not yours!{br}I'll nail your foul mouth closed!{w}
Heh. You really are Eldigan's sister.{br}Shoulda known you wouldn't be a pushover.{w}
What's that? Do you know my brother?!{w}
Oh, yeah. Eldigan and me, we go way back.{w}{br}I'd never've been so nosy if he hadn't asked me to keep an eye on ya.{w}
Is that so? Oh, I'm sorry for snapping at you so-{w}
Eh, I've seen a lot worse in me time.{w}{br}Hey, how about a quick battle lesson?{w}{br}Eldigan thought it'd be a big help.{w}
Why, thank you. I'd like that.{w}

name: AlecSylviaTalk
commands: Hey! You're Sylvia, aren't you?{w}{br}Excuse me for being so forward, but you're adorable!{w}
Finally! Here I was, thinkin' this army's nothin' but stiff and borin' military types.{w}{br}It's about time someone appreciated me!{w}
Heh, I guess I'm the only decent guy around here. Glad I found you.{w}
I guess we'll be here a while, so how about dinner sometime?{w}{br}Bet that'd be nice.{w}
Ooh, yeah! Maybe I'll dance for you too!{w}{br}I've got _a special one_ that nobody's seen yet.{w}{br}It's kinda embarassing, 'cause it's VERY special.{w}{br}Maybe I'll show it to ya, though!{w}
Y-you will? Oh, I can't wait!{w}

name: ErinysRecruit
commands: Wait... Erinys?!{br}The hell are you doing here?{w}
Huh? Aren't you... It can't be! Prince Lewyn?!{w}{br}... What exactly are you wearing, milord?{w}
What, this? I'm a bard now. You know, walking the land, spreading songs and cheer?{w}{br}What do you say: perfect, or perfect?{w}
Er... Perfect? But why, milord...{w}{br}Aren't you supposed to be held captive at Evans?{w}{br}I got here as fast as I could, but...{w}
I'm imprisoned at Evans, am I?{br}Where'd you here that one?{w}
King Chagall of Agustria said so.{w}

Chagall? Hah! Hate to break it to you, Erinys,{br}but you've been tricked!{w}{br}It's nice and all that you're so ready to trust,{w}{br}but you wouldn't last ten seconds out there in the city!{w}{br}It'd eat you and your innocence alive.{br}You might even end up like Sylvia...{w}
Oh, Sylvia's... Er, it's not important.{w}{br}Point is, what are you doing all the way out here?{w}

Isn't it obvious?{w}{br}I'm here to find and bring you home, milord.{w}{br}It's been two years since you fled Silesse.{w}{br}Her Majesty is gravely worried about you.{w}{br}Please, milord. Come home with me.{w}

Do you have any idea what that'd do to Silesse, Erinys?{w}{br}If I go back, I'll have no choice but to take the throne.{w}{br}It's my father's last will, but my uncles would never accept it.{w}{br}Just one false step and we'd have a civil war, just like here.{w}{br}And it's always the common folk who suffer for it!{w}{br}If there are people who want to be kings or whatever, great!{w}{br}Out here, though, I'm free, and I like it that way.{w}{br}I don't want a thing to do with that throne.{w}{br}For the good of Silesse, just give it to one of my uncles.{w}

I can't allow that, milord.{w}{br}You know as well as I do that the kings of Silesse must descent from Forseti, the wind god.{w}{br}You, milord, are the sole living scion of his lineage.{w}{br}None of your uncles bear it.{br}You, milord, are Silesse's future!{w}{br}Yourself and your uncles aside, all Silesse wishes to see you claim the throne.{w}{br}And... and your mother, the queen, was in tears when she sent me...{w}{br}Please, milord... Come back.{w}

Erinys... Ugh, don't you start crying too!{w}{br}Give me a break... I can't stand to see a woman in tears...{w}{br}Okay, fine... I'll think about going home.{w}{br}Just... Give me some time to muster the nerve, alright?{w}
Thank you. In that case, I'm staying with you until you're ready, milord.{w}{br}I'll send a messenger back to Silesse to report that you're safe.{w}

Wow, you're persistent, I'll grant you that.{w}{br}All right, I think I'll stay with Sigurd's army for now.{w}{br}He's a pretty neat guy to work with, not to mention his army's full of beauties!{w}{br}Hey, Erinys, you could stand to get to know some of the ladies here.{w}{br}Maybe their stylishness could rub off on you a bit!{w}
Hey, I'm just kidding, Erinys! Relax a bit!{br}Don't take everything so seriously!{w}{br}...Heh, nobody in the world's as sweet as you.{br}Don't you ever change a thing.{w}
Y-yes, sir... I mean, no, milord...{w}

name: ErinysSigurdTalk
commands: I am indeed. And you, madam?{w}
My name is Erinys. I'm a royal knight of Silesse.{w}{br}I wish to join your army, so as to keep an eye on Prince Lewyn.{w}
Er... Prince Lewyn?{br}What are you on about?{w}
My lord Lewyn is the rightful heir to the Silessian crown.{w}{br}He is a scion of Sety, the Wind Crusader, and is the sole inheritor of his power.{w}
Wait, THAT Lewyn?{w}{br}Heh... I knew there was something odd about him,{w} but I'd never have thought him to be Silessian royalty.{w}{br}Any idea why he's pretending to be a bard?{w}
That's a long story, sir,{w}{br}and I'm hardly the most qualified to tell it.{w}{br}Perhaps try asking him later, but for now...{w}
Fair enough.{br}It's hardly my business, anyway.{w}{br}I'm glad you're here, Erinys.{w}{br}A pegasus knight among us would be a great help.{w}{br}Would you mind aiding us in battle?{w}
Yes, sir! I'll do my part!{w}

name: LachesisRecruit
commands: Sir Sigurd! Thank goodness you're here!{w}{br}Things were looking so bleak for a moment...{w}
I'm glad to see you're safe, Lachesis.{br}What about Eldigan? Is he still being held?{w}
Yes, he's still in Agusty... It's as if all the lords of Agustria have turned on us.{w}{br}Please, Sir Sigurd... Lend us your might.{w}{br}No matter what it takes, my brother must be saved.{w}

Of course. I'vee no fondness for bringing war to foreign lands,{w}{br}but in this case we've little choice.{w}{br}His Majesty, King Azmur, is aware of King Imca's assassination,{w}{br}and of Chagall's hand in it.{w}{br}He's received word of Chagall's ambitions to invade Grannvale itself,{w}{br}and has already approved military action.{w}{br}His Majesty also believes Eldigan's rescue to be vital if we're to put an end to hostilities.{w}{br}Rest assured, Lachesis.{br}I swear that I'll save Eldigan...{w}

name: Shop
commands: Good day, sir! Preparing for battle?{w}{br}Then don't forget to come to my shop for some equipment!{w}
